summary: Full backend + frontend testing completed for M & J Auto Services marketing site. All 8 backend pytest tests pass (root, shop status, contact CRUD with validation). All frontend flows verified: loader, hero, 10 service cards, animated counters, reviews carousel nav, contact form end-to-end submission with DB persistence, map/hours/phone, today-row highlighting, mobile hamburger menu.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py stores datetime as ISO string in Mongo then coerces back in GET — works fine but slight inefficiency; BSON native datetime would be cleaner.
No rate limiting or captcha on POST /api/contact — production risk for spam submissions.
CORS currently allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True — technically invalid per CORS spec; browsers ignore credentials in this config. Should restrict origins in production.
GET /api/contact is unauthenticated and exposes all user submissions including emails/phones — privacy concern; should be protected by auth before going live.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_-prefixed contact submissions created in MongoDB 'contacts' collection during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. Frontend data-testids are comprehensive and working. Note: 'Today' label uses CSS uppercase so JS innerText returns 'TODAY' — use case-insensitive checks. Shop was 'Closed' during test (weekend/off-hours PT) which is expected behavior.
